name: open-skills
description: Reusable, inspectable skills for AI coding agents. Each skill ships a SKILL.md (plain-language protocol); 39 of 57 also ship a protocol.yon — a declarative contract of named steps, MUST/MUST_NOT rules, and ABORT/WARN gates, validated by @younndai/yon-parser. A personal project by Alexandru Mares demonstrating the open YON format; not a YounndAI product. Read every line before you trust it.
